## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `python -m pytest tools/tests -q` passes locally.
- [ ] Tools still run both from `tools/` and as `python tools/<tool>.py`.
- [ ] No new heavy/non-deterministic dependencies; console output stays ASCII.
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or usage changed.
- [ ] No competition secrets or un-disclosed model details added (see the model-card disclosure policy).
